title: 3D Vanilla
description: Vanilla-friendly resource pack adding depth to blocks through subtle 3D models.
body:
This resource pack adds subtle **3D models** to a variety of Minecraft blocks, enhancing their depth and detail while keeping the classic **vanilla style** intact. It’s designed to be **vanilla-friendly**, so your game still feels like Minecraft—just with a more immersive look.

**Download this pack if you:**
- Enjoy the vanilla aesthetic but want extra visual polish.
- Prefer packs that improve immersion without alienating the game.

The goal of this pack is to give players a better everyday Minecraft experience—everything looks a little more alive, but nothing feels out of place. It works seamlessly and it’s great for both builders and adventurers.

**Critical info before downloading:**
1. Compatible with the latest version of Minecraft.
2. No unzipping needed.
3. Fully functional without Optifine, but will also work alongside it.
4. An optional showcase world is included ([download here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/vanilla-3d-gallery) and extract the .zip into your ``saves`` folder), so you can quickly explore all the enhanced blocks in one place.
5. If you notice performance issues, try using [3D Vanilla Lite](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-vanilla-lite).

Playing on older versions of Minecraft? Download [this version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3dvanilla/version/v1.7.1.backwards-compatible) of the pack to avoid broken models.
